qualityFocus: Counts, noindex/redirect exclusion, duplicate slugs, build, sitemap, canonicals, hreflang, language switch, RTL/LTR, broken links, host safety, quality artifact PASS.
validationChecks: git status --short; npx.cmd tsc --noEmit; npx.cmd astro check; npm.cmd run build; strict quality recheck CSV; final status clean before commit.
notes: Commit only after PASS.

qualityFocus: Every page must be useful standalone localized content, not literal translation. Preserve same intent; local keyword natural; no stuffing; no unsupported traffic/ranking/sales/follower/legal/financial/accuracy claims; AdSense safe; no fake identity/document/security/harassment/spam/adult/hateful/violent framing.
validationChecks: Human spot-check representative high-risk tools per language plus automated artifact checks.
notes: Arabic RTL and natural phrasing; hi/bn word order; ja/ko natural terminology.

qualityFocus: Each 40-tool-equivalent batch adds 680 localized pages. Expected final localized tool pages after rollout: 6443, plus current non-localized pages. Build time, sitemap size, Vercel output copy time, and chunk warnings should be tracked per batch.
validationChecks: Record build page count and elapsed time in each batch artifact. Consider smaller 25-35 tool batches if build time or memory grows sharply.
notes: Current proven build: 1139 pages. Full rollout adds 5763 pages over current state.
